title: Peruvian 6x4 Pre Cut Straight Fringe Hazelnut 16 Inch
description:
Peruvian 6x4 Pre Cut Straight Fringe Wig – Hazelnut 16”

Sleek. Soft. Ready to wear.

The Peruvian 6x4 Pre Cut Straight Fringe Wig in Hazelnut (16 Inch) is your effortless everyday statement. Made from 100% premium Peruvian human hair, this straight fringe wig comes professionally pre-cut — so there’s no extra styling required.

Just install and go.

The warm Hazelnut brown shade adds natural richness and dimension, flattering a wide range of skin tones.

✨ Key Features

• 100% Peruvian Human Hair
• 6x4 Lace Closure
• Pre-Cut Straight Fringe (Bangs)
• 16 Inch Length
• Soft, Silky Straight Texture
• Beginner Friendly
• Heat Styling Safe

📏 Length & Fit

16 inches – sits just below the shoulders for a polished, flattering finish.

The 6x4 lace closure provides a natural-looking scalp and realistic parting space.

🤎 Why You’ll Love It

✔ No salon cutting needed
✔ Natural fullness with movement
✔ Easy to maintain
✔ Perfect everyday straight wig
✔ Rich Hazelnut brown tone

💁🏽♀️ Perfect For

• First-time wig wearers
• Women who love fringe styles
• Low-maintenance installs
• Sleek, straight looks

title: Peruvian 6x4 Pre Cut Straight Lace Wig 12 Inch
description:
More parting. Less hassle. 

Upgrade your routine with our Peruvian 6x4 Pre Cut Straight Lace Wig. Featuring 6x4 parting, this wig gives you extra parting space where it matters most, allowing for more styling flexibility with a seamless finish.

Crafted with premium HC Peruvian hair, this wig comes fully pre-plucked, pre-bleached, pre-styled, and ready to install straight out of the box. Go glueless for a quick, secure fit, or melt it down for an ultra-snatch if you choose.

Key Features:

  • Lace Type: 6x4 lace

  • Hair Type: HC Premium Peruvian hair

  • Wear Type: Can be worn glueless or installed

  • Customisation: Fully pre-plucked, pre-bleached knots, and pre-styled

  • Ease of Use: No salon needed – truly beginner-friendly

  • Look & Feel: Natural density, soft texture, sleek finish

Whether you’re heading to work, brunch, or the dance floor, this wig was made to save time without sacrificing style. It's everything a wig should be — secure, stylish, and effortlessly natural.

title: Brazilian Straight Fringe 22"
description:
Sleek, timeless, and effortlessly stylish — our Brazilian Straight Fringe Wig (22") is the ultimate go-to for everyday glam.

Crafted from premium Brazilian hair, this wig delivers long-lasting shine and a flawless, natural finish.
Completely FULL CAP, glueless and adjustable, it’s designed for all-day comfort and easy wear — no fuss, no tape, no stress.

Whether you’re heading to work, brunch, or a night out, our Peruvian LUX Straight Bob blends seamlessly and moves just like your natural hair — giving you style and confidence that lasts.

title: Brazilian 13x4 Lace Frontal Wig Straight
description:
Brazilian 13x4 Lace Frontal Wig – Straight

Sleek, silky, and made to turn heads — our Brazilian 13x4 Straight Lace Frontal Wig is the ultimate go-to for a polished, everyday glam. Designed with a full 13x4 lace frontal, it gives you freedom to part and style your hair any way you like while keeping a natural, undetectable hairline.

Key Features:

  • Texture: Straight – smooth, soft, and easy to maintain.

  • Lace Type: 13x4 frontal – more parting space and styling versatility.

  • Hair Type: 100% Brazilian hair – silky-soft and tangle-free.

  • Construction: Pre-plucked and ready to wear; can be installed glueless.

  • Styling: Heat-friendly for straight, curled, or sleek-back looks.

✨ Why You’ll Love It
This wig combines effortless styling with a flawless finish. The sleek texture gives that timeless, salon-fresh look — perfect for work, events, or nights out when you want a classic straight glam that never fails.

title: Peruvian LUX 13x4 Lace Frontal Wig Straight colour 427
description:
Only at Hair City – Your Hair Destination

Feel unstoppable with this HC exclusive. Our Peruvian LUX Lace Frontal Wigs are designed for women who expect more – more luxury, more confidence, and more compliments. Trusted by over 600,000 customers throughout South Africa, Hair City brings you only the best in premium wigs and hair solutions.

✨ Why Customers Love This Wig:

  • Signature Hair City Quality: Made with Ultimate Lux Peruvian Hair, this wig is silky, soft, lightweight, and crafted to exceed your expectations.
  • Full, Flawless Volume: The full-density design creates a naturally voluminous finish, helping you stand out without trying too hard.
  • HC Ultra-Thin Swiss Lace: Our lace disappears against your scalp for an invisible hairline and a seamless blend.
  • 13x4 Lace Frontal Cap: Versatile styling so you can part it your way and own your look every time.
  • 18 Inches of Effortless Glam: The perfect length to take you from workday chic to weekend goddess in seconds.
  • Sun-Kissed Highlighted Brown (Col 427): A beautifully blended brown with golden highlights, handpicked by HC stylists to give you a radiant, dimensional finish that complements a wide range of skin tones.
  • Tangle-Free & Shed-Free: Premium Hair City craftsmanship means silky-smooth styling with every wear.
  • Long-Lasting Quality: Enjoy over a year of flawless beauty with the right care – Hair City wigs are built to last.

Hair City is South Africa’s trusted leader in premium wigs and luxury hair. Feel the difference. Wear the best. Only at Hair City.

Part of our Premium Peruvian Collection, this wig combines unbeatable quality with true ready-to-wear convenience. ✨ Why RUBY is a favourite:

For over a decade, RUBY has been the go-to bob wig for women who want instant sophistication and premium Peruvian quality. It’s the ultimate ready-to-wear wig – tried, tested, and loved since 2012.

description:

With its ultra-realistic hairline that has bleached knots and pre-plucked, making your lace melt naturally into your skin. Our double drawn lace front wig is the epitome of luxury hair with its sleek cut, and double drawn length making it perfect for any occasion. 

Get ready to turn heads and make a statement! A must-have addition to your wig collection.

title: Wig Special 1 - Lace Frontal Straight 10"
description:
BEST SELLER PLUS A FREE HC TRAVEL BAG!

Spoil yourself with our stunning selling Brazilian straight 10" lace frontal wig special including your very own FREE HC Travel Bag!

WIG FEATURES

  • Glueless & Ready-to-Wear
  • Pre-Styled
  • Highest Quality Brazilian Full Density Hair
  • Stunning Natural pre-plucked Hairline
  • Cuticles are in tact & aligned in the same direction
  • Tangle & Shed free
  • Additional elastic for support
  • Elastic combos and adjustable straps to ensure the perfect fit

title: Peruvian Lace Frontal Wig - Kimmie - 8"
description:
KIMMIE – Our Iconic Best Seller Since 2012

For over a decade, KIMMIE has been loved by thousands of clients for its flawless finish and unmatched quality. Designed to look completely natural and save you styling time, this wig is ready-to-wear straight out the box.

✨ What makes KIMMIE special:

  • Ultra-small, perfectly bleached knots (you won’t find knots like this anywhere else in SA)

  • Natural pre-plucked hairline for an effortless install

  • Pre-styled so you’re out the door in minutes

  • No glue or tape required – secure fit with adjustable straps

  • Premium Swiss lace for breathability and comfort

  • 100% Peruvian human hair with intact cuticles, aligned in the same direction

  • Tangle-free and shed-free for lasting beauty

  • Can be dyed to your preference

  • With proper aftercare, lasts 1–2 years

KIMMIE combines luxury and convenience, making it the ultimate choice for anyone who wants salon-quality glam in seconds.

title: Double Drawn Peruvian Lace Front wig - Kimmie - 14"
description:
Introducing the ultimate head-turner: KIMMIE, our luxurious double drawn 14" bob lace front wig that will leave you looking and feeling like a superstar!

With its ultra-realistic hairline that has bleached knots and pre-plucked, making your lace melt naturally into your skin. Kimmie is the epitome of luxury hair with its sleek cut, and double drawn length making it perfect for any occasion. 

Get ready to turn heads and make a statement! A must-have addition to your wig collection.

title: Peruvian Lace front Wig Kourtney
description:
Highest Quality Peruvian Hair

Our Kourtney wig is made out of the highest quality hair. This 12" bob is a must-have style!

Our Kourtney lace front wig comes pre-plucked and bleached to achieve a natural looking hairline. The ear-to-ear lace frontal allows you to easily style the hair in which ever way desired. With added adjustable straps and clips for extra security when wearing the wig. 

  • Cuticles intact and aligned in the same direction
  • Swiss lace for extra comfort
  • Lasts more than 1 year with proper aftercare

title: Peruvian 4x4 Lace Wig - Straight
description:
HIGHEST QUALITY PERUVIAN HAIR 



Our Peruvian lace wig is made of the highest quality 12A hair. This stunning style is a 4x4 parting which makes this super easy-to-wear, with no glue or tape needed at all! Our Peruvian wig has a natural looking and pre-plucked hairline. With proper after care this wig can last longer than one year.

title: Brazilian Headband Wig  Straight
description:
Quick and easy Headband Wig. Ready-to-go in 3 seconds!

title: Brazilian Beginner Wig Kim K
description:
👑 Hair City Brazilian Kim K Bob
Deep Parting Lace Wig

Sleek. Sharp. Statement-making.

The ultimate blunt bob.

Crafted from premium Brazilian human hair, this Kim K inspired cut delivers a smooth, glass-like finish with natural movement and healthy shine.

The deep parting creates a realistic scalp look, giving you that clean, structured, model-off-duty aesthetic.

Precision cut. No layers. No bulk.
Just effortless glam.

title: Brazilian 4x4 Lace Wig - Straight
description:
Brazilian 4x4 Lace Wig – Straight

Sleek, smooth, and effortlessly polished — our Brazilian 4x4 Lace Wig (Straight) is designed for everyday wear with a premium finish. Made from high-quality HC Brazilian hair, this wig delivers natural movement, long-lasting softness, and a flawless straight look that never goes out of style.

The 4x4 lace closure offers a natural-looking part and an easy, beginner-friendly install. With soft, breathable lace, adjustable straps, and a lightweight feel, this wig is comfortable enough for all-day wear and versatile enough for any occasion.

Whether you’re heading to work or stepping out for the weekend, this straight Brazilian lace wig gives you a clean, confident look with minimal effort.

Features:
• Premium HC Brazilian hair
• 4x4 lace closure for a natural hairline
• Soft, breathable lace
• Glueless
• Adjustable straps for a secure, comfortable fit
• Tangle-free & shed-free
• Lightweight and easy to style
• Suitable for everyday wear

title: Brazilian Fringe 16"

Brazilian Fringe Bob – 16”

description:
